subject: Null vals
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I am trying to export my frames as TS's and some of them are raising this error.
"
Input string was not in a correct format.

Value cannot be null.
Parameter name: path2

Value cannot be null.
Parameter name: path2

Value cannot be null.
Parameter name: path2

Value cannot be null.
Parameter name: path2
"

But I am not sure which ones and why this error is being raised and if
i should be worried.
Could you help me understand what is happening here?

Best,
Pranav
--
Pranav Shah
Postdoctoral Research Fellow.

Division of Structural Biology,
Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
University of Oxford,
Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
UK
